items.title: Undrafted free agent Riley Wilson to sign with Patriots
items.summary: The Patriots are signing undrafted free agent Riley Wilson, his representation, PM3 Sports Management, announced.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Captain Salt leads Fire to victory against Brave
items.summary: Welsh Fire captain Phil Salt leads from the front as his unbeaten 47 helps them begin the 2026 Hundred season with a six-wicket win against Southern Brave in Southampton.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Inter Miami under investigation after signing Casemiro
items.summary: Major League Soccer says it is investigating allegations of tampering by Inter Miami after the club signed Brazil midfielder Casemiro.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
